title: A question about a monday feature
excerpt:
Hi Everyone 
Does anyone know how to send an image as email? I saw that in the automation you can send a text but I would like to send an email template that I create. 
in Monday Work management

posts.author: TheSpectrumaker (Ayowole Akinmokunwa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone

Does anyone know how to send an image as email? I saw that in the automation you can send a text but I would like to send an email template that I create.

in Monday Work management

posts.author: rachelmeltzerlee (Rachel Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: There are many email automations available if you search “email” in automations! That being said, when it comes to the image capabilities, many users have found Make helpful in sending emails with images! You can find more information on Make here: https://www.make.com/en
